description: Knowledge base topic index for HGUGM Cirugía Oral y Maxilofacial residency course.
authors: HGUGM · Residentes — Servicio de Cirugía Oral y Maxilofacial.

topics.title: TNM 8th Edition Staging for Oral Cavity Cancer
topics.summary: AJCC 8th edition incorporates depth of invasion (DOI) into T classification for oral cavity cancer. DOI >10 mm = T3 regardless of size.

topics.title: Neck Dissection Classification
topics.summary: Academy/AHNS classification of neck dissections. Levels I-VI. Radical, modified radical, selective, and extended neck dissections.

topics.title: Free Flap Reconstruction — Fibula Free Flap
topics.summary: Fibula free flap as gold standard for mandibular reconstruction. CAD/CAM virtual surgical planning. Monitoring and salvage protocols.

topics.title: Orthognathic Surgery — Virtual Surgical Planning
topics.summary: Virtual surgical planning allows 3D simulation of orthognathic movements. CAD/CAM fabricated surgical splints. Comparison with model surgery.

topics.title: Third Molar Classification — Pell-Gregory and Winter
topics.summary: Pell-Gregory (depth A/B/C, class I/II/III) and Winter (mesioangular, vertical, distoangular, horizontal) classification for third molar impaction.

topics.title: TMJ Disorders — Wilkes Classification
topics.summary: Wilkes classification stages I-V for TMJ internal derangement. Stage I/II: non-surgical. Stage III/IV: arthroscopic lysis/lavage. Stage V: open arthroplasty or total joint replacement.
guidelines: AAOMS TMJ Disorders Parameters of Care 2023

topics.title: Le Fort Fracture Classification
topics.summary: Le Fort I: transverse maxillary fracture above teeth. Le Fort II: pyramidal fracture through nasal bones. Le Fort III: craniofacial disjunction.

topics.title: Cleft Lip and Palate — Timing of Repair
topics.summary: Cleft lip repair at 3 months ('rule of 10s'). Palate repair at 9-12 months to optimize speech. Two-stage palate repair in wide clefts.
guidelines: ACPA Parameters for Evaluation and Treatment 2023

topics.title: Evidence-Based OMFS — Critical Appraisal
topics.summary: GRADE framework for evidence quality. CONSORT for RCT reporting. Common biases in surgical trials. Hierarchy of evidence.

topics.title: Statistical Methods in OMFS Research
topics.summary: Sample size calculation, power analysis, survival analysis methods in OMFS outcomes research.

note: Knowledge base topic index for HGUGM Cirugía Oral y Maxilofacial residency course.
